description: §14.8.7/§44.2 — a `<db>` state block with no `src=` attribute fires E-PA-006. The protect-analyzer needs a database path (or driver URI) to build the shadow DB it validates SQL + protect columns against; without it, it fails closed.
source-test: compiler/src/protect-analyzer.ts (E-PA-006 fire site, step 1: src= presence)
rationale: protect-analyzer §step1: a `<db>` block missing the required `src=` attribute cannot resolve a database path, so the shadow-DB build is impossible and E-PA-006 fires (skip-and-return). The confidentiality analysis has no ground truth without a schema source.
